list.title: Team List
list.description: Agent = Bot + Collaboration Mode. Combine different bots and collaboration patterns to accomplish various tasks
list.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this team? This action cannot be undone.
list.unbind_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to unbind this shared team? This will remove it from your team list, but the original team will not be affected.
list.force_delete_confirm_message: This team has {{count}} running task(s). Deleting this team may affect these tasks.
list.force_delete_warning: Warning: Force deleting may cause running tasks to fail or become orphaned.
list.share_failed: Failed to share team, please try again
list.group_required_message: When creating an agent in group mode, a group must be selected first
list.share_instructions_content1: Copy and send this link to others, they can use your shared team to complete tasks directly through the link.
list.share_instructions_content2: After sharing the team, you can still manage and edit this team, and others can apply the latest team configuration but cannot edit the team settings.

share.title: Team Share
share.confirm_message: Do you want to use {{userName}}'s {{teamName}} to execute tasks?
share.join_description: After confirmation, {{teamName}} will be added to your team list, and you can use this team to create and execute tasks.
share.self_share_message: {{teamName}} is your team, no need to join.
share.already_joined_message: {{teamName}} is already in your team list, no need to join again.
share.fetch_info_failed: Failed to fetch shared team information
share.self_share_suffix: is your team, no need to join.
share.already_joined_suffix: is already in your team list, no need to join again.
share.join_description_suffix: will be added to your team list, and you can use this team to create and execute tasks.

form.name: Name
form.prompts_tooltip: Add team-only guidance that is appended to each bot's base prompt.
form.prompts_scope_hint: Prompts added here are appended to each bot's base prompt and only affect this team.
form.prompts_scope_sub: Other teams continue to use their own configurations.
form.prompts_placeholder: Add team-level instructions that will run with this bot inside the team.
form.prompts_badge_tooltip: This bot runs with an extra team-only prompt add-on.
form.prompts_save_success: Prompts saved! They will be applied when you save the team.
form.dify_mode_pipeline_only: Dify bots only support pipeline execution mode.
form.dify_no_members_hint: Dify bots handle execution independently and do not support team members.
form.mode_change_confirm_message: Changing the collaboration mode will reset team roles and team-specific prompts. Do you want to continue?

collaboration_mode_desc.solo: A single bot handles the task independently, suitable for simple scenarios or single-responsibility workflows.
collaboration_mode_desc.pipeline: Agents are chained one after another, where each agent refines or transforms the result in turn.
collaboration_mode_desc.route: A central agent acts as a message router, directing communication between agents without them talking directiy.
collaboration_mode_desc.coordinate: A network pattern is the structure that defines how agents connect, exchange information, and coordinate with each other.
collaboration_mode_desc.collaborate: Multiple agents work simultaneously on tasks, often sharing results to speed up processing.
